sourceAmbiguity: Cross-channel parity could be reviewed visually without durable machine proof.
decisionTaken: Published matrix, contract, validator, and Playwright assertions for parity drift.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Semantic parity must be regression-testable rather than aesthetic.
operationalRisk: New channel contexts may omit parity matrix rows.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Add a matrix row, contract channel context, and Playwright assertion for every new entry point.
